title: Universe Craft
description: A tech modpack with space exploration and automation with quests for easier beginnings.
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e9f0a4b642bb4a8caa8d44bc585689412475c51b.png)

About this modpack

Modpack provides great experience in exploration with core mod being Ad astra and Create. This modpack contains many futuristic, world enhancing, quality of life changers mods. [_I would recommend allocating more ram for this modpack._](https://help.meloncube.net/hc/en-us/articles/39926574869275-How-To-Allocate-More-Ram-in-the-Modrinth-Launcher) Although these planets are limited, they are interesting to explore anyways. ![mining on the moon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ZDdCYhfb/images/0020549179a5f5b14d6552be86160c9fd0e75d69.png) It has rewarding quests and cohesive progression, **dont forget to install mods below in order for it to work. Just download the modpack and drag and drop downloaded files into the app.** ![mars creature](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c6a09a8ea32b92a924b129626d4a32ab8321ebce.jpeg) Core mods used are [Ad astra](https://modrinth.com/mod/ad-astra) and [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) which are combined with more mods that bend a rules a bit to make progression make sense. It uses mods and tweaks for effects to make the world more lively.

![landscape](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ZDdCYhfb/images/22a4fc7e41491d1ce4ef43fef708f1bad490dda0.png)

You need to Download these separetly from CurseForge:

- [CobbleGenRandomizer](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cobblegenrandomizer/download/4817846) - [Mining Gadgets](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mining-gadgets/download/4864220) - [FTB Library (Forge)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ftb-library-forge/download/7296748) - [FTB Teams (Forge)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ftb-teams-forge/download/6130786) - [FTB Quests (Forge)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ftb-quests-forge/download/7260736)

Modpack content:

- [Complementary Reimagined r5.6.1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/HVnmMxH1/versions/OfRF7dTR/ComplementaryReimagined_r5.6.1.zip) High-quality shaderpack that enhances lighting, shadows, water, and overall visual effects. - [Falling Leaves 1.20.1-2.1.2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/2JAUNCL4/versions/j5eND1ZA/fallingleaves-1.20.1-2.1.2.jar) Adds falling leaf particles to trees for improved atmosphere and immersion. - [JEI 1.20.1 Forge 15.20.0.128](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/u6dRKJwZ/versions/MdKE2PdF/jei-1.20.1-forge-15.20.0.128.jar) In-game recipe viewer and item lookup tool. - [EMI 1.1.22 Forge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/fRiHVvU7/versions/WtJS5tVw/emi-1.1.22%2B1.20.1%2Bforge.jar) Alternative recipe and item browsing interface. - [Even More Instruments 6.1.4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Mcs3cqJ1/versions/Y3VmW2Cj/evenmoreinstruments-1.20-1.20.1-6.1.4.jar) Adds additional playable instruments. - [Steam Rails 1.6.14 Beta](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ZzjhlDgM/versions/ubktvkSZ/Steam_Rails-1.6.14-beta%2Bforge-mc1.20.1.jar) Expands Create’s railway system with steam locomotives and rail content. - [MCEF Forge 2.1.6](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/TObQ0HxZ/versions/x91l6OKB/mcef-forge-2.1.6-1.20.1.jar) Allows in-game web content rendering. - [Polytone 3.5.17](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/3qAYkBMB/versions/8ZyqCu36/polytone-1.20-3.5.17.jar) Enhances and customizes in-game audio systems. - [Better Leaves 9.4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/uvpymuxq/versions/JW14JsXq/Better-Leaves-9.4.zip) Improves leaf block visuals for fuller trees. - [TFMG 1.0.2e](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/USgVjXsk/versions/OIrDvVJc/tfmg-1.0.2e.jar) Technology-focused mod adding machinery and automation. - [Sound Physics 1.3.0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/qyVF9oeo/versions/sSV5WT7s/soundphysics-forge-1.20.1-1.3.0.jar) Realistic sound reverb and occlusion simulation. - [Create New Age 1.1.7b](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/FTeXqI9v/versions/SFEQocaa/create-new-age-1.1.7b%2Bforge-mc1.20.1.jar) Expansion addon for Create with new technology features. - [Create Addon Compatibility 0.2.4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/QgrK9rtJ/versions/T7gQFXVK/createaddoncompatibility-0.2.4.jar) Improves compatibility between Create addons. - [Create Hypertube 0.3.0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ATDdrG1y/versions/pX1oNdBc/create_hypertube-0.3.0-FORGE.jar) Adds high-speed tube transport systems. - [Traveler’s Backpack 9.1.46](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/rlloIFEV/versions/ZYqaoP1B/travelersbackpack-forge-1.20.1-9.1.46.jar) Wearable backpacks with storage and utilities. - [Perspatium 1.2.0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/IHyWDPnp/versions/oqpXKch5/perspatium-1.20.1-1.2.0.jar) Decorative and building enhancement mod. - [Oculus 1.8.0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/GchcoXML/versions/iQ1SwGc3/oculus-mc1.20.1-1.8.0.jar) Enables shader support on Forge. - [ShulkerBoxTooltip 4.0.4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/2M01OLQq/versions/QMp2SF1u/shulkerboxtooltip-forge-4.0.4%2B1.20.1.jar) Displays shulker box contents inside tooltips. - [Canon Nukes 3.0.0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/T1o3zVRa/versions/LtKXaVrL/canonnukes-3.0.0.jar) Adds powerful explosive weapons and nuclear devices. - [Ambient Sounds 6.3.1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/fM515JnW/versions/5b052xpX/AmbientSounds_FORGE_v6.3.1_mc1.20.1.jar) Immersive biome-based ambient audio system. - [Skin Layers 3D 1.10.1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/zV5r3pPn/versions/evQiUIrz/skinlayers3d-forge-1.10.1-mc1.20.1.jar) Renders player skin layers in full 3D. - [EMIffect 1.1.2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/705gWllI/versions/cwzXpY1E/emiffect-forge-1.1.2%2Bmc1.20.1.jar) Displays active potion effects in EMI interface. - [Distant Horizons 2.4.5](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/uCdwusMi/versions/lC6CwqPp/DistantHorizons-2.4.5-b-1.20.1-fabric-forge.jar) Extends render distance using LOD terrain generation. - [Crops 3D](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/PgpTtNoI/versions/iKYRZwnm/crops-3d%282%29.zip) Improves crop visuals with 3D models. - [Farmer’s Delight 1.2.9](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/R2OftAxM/versions/8rPF1pFi/FarmersDelight-1.20.1-1.2.9.jar) Expands farming and cooking mechanics. - [Continuity 3.0.0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/1IjD5062/versions/9KbAcWSO/continuity-3.0.0%2B1.20.1.forge.jar) Adds connected textures support. - [Particle Effects 1.2.0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/PLAGcSFJ/versions/vZnR7LV5/ParticleEffects-1.2.0%2B1.20.1%2Bforge.jar) Adds additional visual particle effects. - [Fancy Toasts 1.4.5.1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/eUziWqPC/versions/H1RE3Phw/fancytoasts-forge-1.20.1-1.4.5.1.jar) Customizes advancement and notification toasts. - [Ad Astra 1.15.20](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/3ufwT9JF/versions/Qf7QFXk2/ad_astra-forge-1.20.1-1.15.20.jar) Space exploration mod with planets, rockets, and technology. - [Fresh Animations 1.10.3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/50dA9Sha/versions/F9QwVhGH/FreshAnimations_v1.10.3.zip) Resource pack that improves mob animations. - [Crushed Astra 1.0.6](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9GAv60Rl/versions/XoK8OJ5Z/crushedastra-1.0.6-1.20.1.jar) Addon expansion for Ad Astra. - [Create 6.0.8](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/LNytGWDc/versions/8amzvn9x/create-1.20.1-6.0.8.jar) Mechanical automation and kinetic engineering mod. - [Create Ad Astra Recipes 1.0.0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/bFyxs7LI/versions/ojF27UGr/create_ad_astra_recipes-1.0.0-forge-1.20.1.jar) Adds Create-compatible recipe integrations for Ad Astra content. - [Lightman’s Currency 2.3.0.3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/wvMc8AJt/versions/hon9svkT/lightmanscurrency-1.20.1-2.3.0.3.jar) Adds a complete currency, trading, and shop system. - [Embeddium 0.3.31](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/sk9rgfiA/versions/UTbfe5d1/embeddium-0.3.31%2Bmc1.20.1.jar) Performance optimization mod improving rendering and FPS. - [Xaero’s Minimap 23.8.2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/JkSi2Fzx/versions/NOF4JTWs/Xaeros_Minimap_FP23.8.2_Forge_1.20.jar) Adds a fully featured minimap with waypoints and world mapping. - [WebDisplays 2.0.2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/bRa1UAVZ/versions/DHWqG6SF/webdisplays-2.0.2-1.20.1.jar) Allows displaying web content on in-game screens. - [Create Nuclear 1.3.1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/z611fdf7/versions/L3PbtqgG/createnuclear-1.3.1-forge.jar) Nuclear-themed Create addon with reactors and advanced power systems. - [Almost Unified 0.10.1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/sdaSaQEz/versions/803fRd97/almostunified-forge-1.20.1-0.10.1.jar) Unifies duplicate ores and items across different mods. - [Create Big Cannons 5.10.0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/GWp4jCJj/versions/FQT8zeMC/createbigcannons-5.10.0%2Bmc.1.20.1-forge.jar) Large-scale artillery and weaponry addon for Create. - [Subtle Effects 1.13.2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/4q8UOK1d/versions/Ci8SWnwn/SubtleEffects-forge-1.20.1-1.13.2.jar) Adds subtle visual and environmental effects for immersion. - [Genshin Instruments 5.0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/UUD6Qkij/versions/DNcTeIAp/genshinstrument-1.20-1.20.1-5.0.jar) Adds playable instruments inspired by Genshin Impact. - [Simple Grass Flowers v1.9.6](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ti9KkMHm/versions/BFqp4P2V/Simple%20Grass%20Flowers%20v1.9.6.zip) Resource pack improving grass and flower visuals. - [Insects Recrafted 1.1.0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/J7AdgcJz/versions/5RIKa5xz/insects_recrafted_1100.jar) Adds new insect mobs and related content. - [Starter Kit 7.4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6L3ydNi8/versions/8vUVrBt5/starterkit-1.20.1-7.4.jar) Gives configurable starter items when players join. - [Valkyrien Skies 2.3.0 Beta 12](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/V5ujR2yw/versions/9TtF0Jtc/valkyrienskies-120-2.3.0-beta.12.jar) Physics-based ships and moving structures. - [Create Radar 0.3.1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/BLu2Yqfq/versions/gW067sUS/create_radar-0.3.1%2Bmc1.20.1-all.jar) Adds radar and detection systems for Create contraptions. - [EMI Trades 1.2.1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/j2HhbEE7/versions/LBT7pcVH/emitrades-forge-1.2.1%2Bmc1.20.1.jar) Displays villager trades inside EMI interface. - [Alex’s Caves 2.0.2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/U6GY0xp0/versions/lC8HHXOF/alexscaves-2.0.2.jar) Massive cave expansion with new biomes, mobs, and bosses. - [Escalated 1.2.0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/LyOBYG8Q/versions/CxHSm4q6/escalated-1.2.0%2Bcreate.6.0.8-mc.1.20.1-forge.jar) Combat and progression expansion addon for Create. - [AppleSkin 2.5.1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/EsAfCjCV/versions/XdXDExVF/appleskin-forge-mc1.20.1-2.5.1.jar) Shows detailed hunger and saturation information. - [Presence Footsteps (Modded)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pYSXM5rm/versions/LIwW0p6Z/presence%20footsteps%20%28modded%29.zip) Resource pack enhancing footstep sounds for modded blocks. - [Jade 11.13.2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/nvQzSEkH/versions/LecuGude/Jade-1.20.1-Forge-11.13.2.jar) Displays detailed block and entity information in-game. - [EMI Enchanting 0.1.2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/wbWoo11W/versions/s8VlWyjj/emi_enchanting-0.1.2%2B1.20.1%2Bforge.jar) Adds enchantment recipe viewing support to EMI. - [Round Trees 8.0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XlqZTP4W/versions/baL7cp8y/Round-Trees-8.0.zip) Resource pack that makes trees appear rounder and smoother. - [Another Furniture 3.0.4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ulloLmqG/versions/S9tNKT5R/another_furniture-forge-1.20.1-3.0.4.jar) Adds decorative furniture blocks. - [Construction Wand 2.11](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/bV2crgLh/versions/XCgKj8gL/constructionwand-1.20.1-2.11.jar) Makes building large structures faster and easier. - [Jade Addons 5.5.0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/xuDOzCLy/versions/AvIT9ADi/JadeAddons-1.20.1-Forge-5.5.0.jar) Adds extra integrations and information displays for Jade. - [TAMG 1.1.0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/TaE4dGBo/versions/Q8Vm11mR/tamg-1.1.0.jar) Adds additional gameplay mechanics and quality-of-life improvements. - [Serene Seasons 9.1.0.2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/e0bNACJD/versions/YXTfAkOf/SereneSeasons-forge-1.20.1-9.1.0.2.jar) Introduces a dynamic seasonal system that affects crops, weather, and biomes. - [Entity Texture Features 7.0.6](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/BVzZfTc1/versions/StRGhMIZ/entity_texture_features_1.20.1-forge-7.0.6.jar) Adds support for advanced entity texture customization. - [AstraLex V93.0 Shader](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/RphJSnEs/versions/qSbtQS2o/%C2%A7r%C2%A7lAstra%C2%A74%C2%A7lLex%C2%A7r%C2%A7l_By_LexBoosT_%C2%A74%C2%A7lV93.0%C2%A7r%C2%A7l.zip) High-quality cinematic shader pack with enhanced lighting and visuals. - [VillagersPlus 3.1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/oHGMwNDR/versions/Oc5T4c7q/VillagersPlus_3.1_%28FORGE%29_for_1.20.1.jar) Expands villager professions, trades, and village content. - [Visuality 2.0.2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/z13R7Et1/versions/MyhpSYT4/visuality-forge-2.0.2.jar) Adds ambient and decorative particle effects. - [Entity Model Features 3.0.7](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/4I1XuqiY/versions/yvcQe2gF/entity_model_features_1.20.1-forge-3.0.7.jar) Enables advanced custom entity models. - [Create Structures 0.1.1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/IAnP4np7/versions/XALEBs0a/create-structures-0.1.1-1.20.1-FORGE.jar) Adds pre-built Create-themed structures to world generation. - [Create Central Kitchen 1.4.3b](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/btq68HMO/versions/b6J7xYnJ/create_central_kitchen-1.20.1-for-create-6.0.6-1.4.3b.jar) Expands Create with automated food processing systems. - [Better Skies 1.0.2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/K9Uiw3me/versions/tUVwr8ZA/betterskies-1.0.2-forge-1.20.1.jar) Improves sky visuals and atmospheric effects. - [Effectual 1.3.0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/OoF97Pto/versions/k3wdKhjw/effectual-forge-1.3.0-1.20.1.jar) Adds immersive visual and status-based effects. - [Enchant Icons 1.20 v1.3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6vhHOIKw/versions/PXnG3qIS/enchant%20icons%201.20%20v1.3.zip) Resource pack that adds icons to enchantments. - [Xaero’s World Map 1.36.0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/NcUtCpym/versions/lsh7rZ8c/XaerosWorldMap_1.36.0_Forge_1.20.jar) Full-screen world map companion to Xaero’s Minimap. - [EMI Create Schematics 1.0.4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5bgqgixq/versions/2NUcJSCw/emi_create_schematics-1.0.4.jar) Adds Create schematic integration to EMI. - [Drip Sounds 0.5.2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/T8MMXTpr/versions/AuwiyteP/Drip%20Sounds-0.5.2%2B1.20.4-Forge.jar) Adds realistic cave drip sound effects. - [Classic 3D v2.0.0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/FRSckbRo/versions/zbVnofRR/%C2%A76%C2%A7lClassic%203D%C2%A7c%20v2.0.0-A.9%C2%A7e%201.20.zip) Resource pack that adds 3D block models. - [Wormhole 1.1.16](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6nHZTTjQ/versions/qTnVesOt/wormhole-1.1.16-forge-mc1.20.jar) Adds teleportation portals and warp mechanics. - [Goop Reforged 1.1.1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/OadYF9zI/versions/oi2xl2Zn/GoopReforged-1.20.1-1.1.1.jar) Adds slime-themed tools and mechanics. - [Fast Better Grass](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/dspVZXKP/versions/xteFNcow/Fast%20Better%20Grass.zip) Resource pack improving grass rendering. - [EMI Loot 0.7.8](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/qbbO7Jns/versions/jpsoDtJz/emi_loot-0.7.8%2B1.20.1-fix1%2Bforge.jar) Displays loot tables within EMI. - [Gentler Weather Sounds 2.1.0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/GB2EXKpD/versions/DBzbXaOH/Gentler%20Weather%20Sounds%202.1.0.zip) Softer and more immersive weather audio. - [3D Armor 0.9.2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XhxKIfGG/versions/bP8St1uj/3d-armor-0.9.2-mod.jar) Adds 3D modeled armor visuals. - [Melody Forge 1.0.3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/CVT4pFB2/versions/lJlW5r8R/melody_forge_1.0.3_MC_1.20.1-1.20.4.jar) Adds enhanced music and audio systems. - [Particle Rain 4.0.0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/nrikgvxm/versions/DoKcxpR8/particlerain-4.0.0-beta.5%2B1.20.1-forge.jar) Improves rain particle effects. - [Biomes O’ Plenty 19.0.0.96](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/HXF82T3G/versions/jxUqRzSD/BiomesOPlenty-forge-1.20.1-19.0.0.96.jar) Massive biome expansion mod. - [Ad Astra More Structures 1.0.0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/1Z4JHpyZ/versions/qZGw4bNN/ad_astra_more_structures-1.0.0.jar) Adds additional space structures to Ad Astra dimensions. - [Photon Shader v1.2a](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/lLqFfGNs/versions/rz2vlXVm/photon_v1.2a.zip) Lightweight performance-friendly shader pack. - [Naturalist 5.0pre3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/F8BQNPWX/versions/Cx95h37p/naturalist-5.0pre3%2Bforge-1.20.1.jar) Adds realistic wildlife and animals. - [Moving Elevators 1.4.11](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9KZOe6HD/versions/TBwf7VQL/movingelevators-1.4.11-forge-mc1.20.1.jar) Adds functional elevator blocks. - [Oil Well Yeeter 0.4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/vvsliqlH/versions/2dkjMGIF/oil_well_yeeter-0.4-1.20.1.jar) Removes or alters oil well generation. - [FancyMenu 3.8.1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Wq5SjeWM/versions/MywA2BxT/fancymenu_forge_3.8.1_MC_1.20.1.jar) Fully customizable main menu system. - [Entity Culling 1.9.4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/NNAgCjsB/versions/GpUlMGON/entityculling-forge-1.9.4-mc1.20.1.jar) Improves performance by culling hidden entities. - [Create Enchantment Industry 1.3.3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/JWGBpFUP/versions/E8bB0Vws/create_enchantment_industry-1.3.3-for-create-6.0.6.jar) Adds automated enchanting systems to Create. - [Clear Void 1.3.0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/xsFn8GIq/versions/5YMCJnNn/clearvoid-forge-1.3.0.jar) Customizable void world generation. - [Simple Grass Flowers PBR](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/lEV76LRM/versions/kEgcQZo5/Simple%20Grass%20Flowers%20PBR.zip) PBR version of improved grass and flower textures. - [Portal Gels 1.3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/4p5ZTIIN/versions/d1UeCx9C/Portal%20Gels%20%5Bv1.3%5D%20%5BForge%201.20.1%5D.jar) Adds Portal-inspired gels with special movement effects. - [Particular 1.2.7](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pYFUU6cq/versions/xwypRJhE/particular-1.20.1-Forge-1.2.7.jar) Adds detailed particle effects. - [Explosive Enhancement 1.1.0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/r0camchr/versions/WZmrfQAK/explosiveenhancement-forge-1.20.1-1.1.0-client.jar) Enhances explosion visuals and effects. - [Just Enough Resources 1.4.0.247](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/uEfK2CXF/versions/jW52tbTk/JustEnoughResources-1.20.1-1.4.0.247.jar) Shows ore and mob spawn distributions. - [Camera Overhaul 2.0.6](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/m0oRwcZx/versions/st2IHj9P/CameraOverhaul-v2.0.6-forge%2Bmc%5B1.20.0-1.20.5%5D.jar) Improves camera movement and animations. - [Mutant Monsters 8.0.8](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/derP0ten/versions/CUgYzMnF/MutantMonsters-v8.0.8-1.20.1-Forge.jar) Adds powerful mutant boss mobs. - [Planets+ 1.7.5](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/NfrID7Y9/versions/joMq8m0L/planets%2B-bv1.7.5-1.20x.jar) Expands planetary content and space features. - [Biome Spawn Point 2.4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/mtfbtanr/versions/IBF2A6NA/biomespawnpoint-1.20.1-2.4.jar) Allows configuring spawn biomes.
